name: chr2_2q24_3_SCN_cluster
description: 2q24.3 sodium-channel alpha-subunit gene cluster: SCN1A, SCN2A, SCN3A, SCN9A arose by tandem segmental duplication and share 70-80% identity. SCN1A mutations cause Dravet syndrome; CNVs across the cluster contribute to severe epileptic encephalopathies.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of voltage-gated sodium-channel alpha-subunit genes (SCN1A, SCN2A, SCN3A, SCN9A, SCN7A) at 60-85% identity over their ~100 kb gene bodies; flanking small SDs of ~10-30 kb.
